input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A man in a light shirt holding a bottle appears on the far left. A woman in a black dress stands with her back turned. A man in a blue shirt talks to a woman in a red floral dress holding a glass. To the right, a woman in a red patterned dress holds a beige clutch.</think><answer></answer>

The subtitle "You'll do all this, right?" displays as she smiles up at him. The text changes to "OK, but you'll make the toast?" as she touches her lips and he reaches for her arm.
[8-10] The subtitle updates to "John, please don't put it on me." The woman lowers her hand to gesture near her chest while gazing upward at the man.
[10-14] The angle shifts to an over-the-shoulder close-up of the woman wearing long gold earrings. In the background, a man in a light blue shirt holds a glass with amber liquid, an older woman with short white hair stands nearby, and a blonde woman in a white top with red floral patterns holds a glass. The subtitle "'Cause I don't like that." appears then disappears as the woman speaks.

[2-4] A man in a white button-down shirt and a woman with long dark hair in a nude strap dress stand face-to-face before a white structure with arched windows. The woman raises her hand near her neck as the subtitle "You'll do all this, right?" appears. [14-18] In a medium shot, the couple continues facing each other; the woman holds a clear glass while the man holds a brown bottle, gazing at one another. [18-20] The camera cuts to a close-up of the woman in the nude dress. Behind her, a blonde woman in a white dress with red floral patterns and an older woman with short white hair stand observing, while the man remains partially visible on the right edge.

[22-24] The scene cuts to a woman in a nude dress and a man in a white shirt standing side-by-side outdoors near a white building structure with arched windows, a blonde woman partially visible on the far left. [24-26] The woman in the nude dress raises her left arm to touch her hair while smiling, beside the man who looks forward with his mouth slightly open. [26-28] She lowers her arm and gazes downward with a subtle smile as the man faces forward appearing to speak. [28-30] Finally, the woman raises her right hand near her shoulder displaying a ring while the blonde woman in a floral top continues to smile and observe the scene.

recent_thinks: [0-2] A man in a light shirt holding a bottle appears on the far left. A woman in a black dress stands with her back turned. A man in a blue shirt talks to a woman in a red floral dress holding a glass. To the right, a woman in a red patterned dress holds a beige clutch.

[20-22] The scene cuts to a wide shot of the party guests mingling outdoors. In the foreground, a man with long hair in a light shirt speaks to a woman in a red floral dress holding a glass. Beside them, a man in a blue button-down shirt stands holding a drink, surrounded by other guests in casual attire.

[30-32] An older woman with short white hair wearing a white top and purple necklace stands on the left. The woman in the nude dress holds a glass with both hands while the man in the white shirt holds a brown bottle near his waist. The blonde woman in the floral dress stands between them smiling.

[32-34] A man in a white shirt stands on the far left with a drink. An older woman with short white hair laughs holding red wine next to a smiling blonde woman in a floral dress. The woman in the nude dress holds a champagne flute beside the man in the white shirt holding a beer bottle before a white building.

[34-36] The scene cuts to a close-up of a woman with wavy brown hair wearing a red floral dress, her mouth open as if speaking. Beside her, a man with long hair and a beard in a light shirt looks toward the right. Other guests are visible in the blurred background.

[36-38] Two men stand side-by-side outdoors with green hedges in the background. The man on the left has a shaved head and wears a light grey button-down shirt, squinting slightly. Beside him, a man with short brown hair in a white shirt smiles while looking forward. A woman with long brown hair is partially visible on the far right edge.

input.system:

- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
